title: How to Sell Templates in GoHighLevel — Marketplace Integration
description: Learn how to sell templates on GoHighLevel's marketplace integration. Monetize your templates without platform switching. Step-by-step guide for agencies.
html_content:
If you're running an agency, you've probably built workflows, funnels, and automation sequences that work. Now imagine packaging those templates and selling them to other businesses—without leaving your GoHighLevel account. That's exactly what GoHighLevel's new Template Library Marketplace Integration makes possible.

For years, agencies have struggled with a fragmented workflow: build templates in one place, manage sales in another, handle support across multiple platforms. GoHighLevel just eliminated that friction. You can now browse, install, and sell templates all within a single unified system. In this guide, I'll walk you through every step of monetizing your template creations and accessing the marketplace ecosystem that's already helping agencies scale their template revenue.

Ready to turn your best templates into a revenue stream? Start your free 30-day trial and see how the marketplace integration works firsthand.

📋 In This Guide

  • Understanding GoHighLevel's Template Marketplace Integration
  • How to Access and Preview Templates in the Library
  • Installing and Filtering Templates by Price and Status
  • Step-by-Step: How to List and Sell Your Own Templates
  • Managing Your Template Listings and Monetization Settings
  • Why Integrated Marketplace Saves Agencies Time and Money

Understanding GoHighLevel's Template Marketplace Integration

GoHighLevel's Template Library Marketplace Integration is a game-changer for agencies. At its core, it's a centralized hub where you can discover professionally designed templates, install them directly into your account, and list your own creations for sale—all without switching platforms.

Before this integration, agencies had to juggle multiple tools: a template repository, a payment processor, a file host, and customer communication channels. The new marketplace eliminates those barriers. You get a unified workflow that handles discovery, installation, licensing, payment processing, and customer support all within GoHighLevel.

The marketplace includes templates for:

  • Sales funnels and landing pages
  • Email automation sequences
  • Social media content calendars
  • Website layouts and components
  • CRM workflows and automation recipes
  • Custom integrations and AI agents

Whether you're looking to accelerate your own agency's workflows or build a template business, this marketplace is your operating center.

How to Access and Preview Templates in the Library

Getting started is straightforward. From your GoHighLevel dashboard, navigate to the Template Library section. This is where all available templates—both free and premium—are displayed.

To access and preview templates:

  1. Log into your GoHighLevel account
  2. Find the Template Library in the main navigation menu
  3. Browse the featured templates or use the search bar to find specific types (e.g., "email funnel" or "sales automation")
  4. Click on any template to view a detailed preview
  5. Review the template description, preview images, and what's included in the installation
  6. Check the creator's ratings and reviews before deciding to install

The preview page shows you exactly what you're getting: the number of pages, automation workflows, email sequences, or custom fields included. This transparency helps you make informed decisions about which templates align with your business needs.

💡 Pro Tip

Preview multiple similar templates before installing. Compare features, design quality, and included automations. Templates are lightweight and easy to modify, so don't worry about finding the "perfect" one—focus on finding one with the core structure you need.

Installing and Filtering Templates by Price and Status

The marketplace makes filtering simple. You can sort templates by several criteria to find exactly what you need without wasting time scrolling through irrelevant options.

Available filters include:

  • Price: Free, paid, or all templates
  • Category: Filter by funnel type, automation, website, or AI agent
  • Installation Status: See which templates you've already installed or which are new
  • Rating: Sort by highest-rated templates first
  • Creator: Filter by specific creators or official GoHighLevel templates

To install a template:

  1. Click the template you want
  2. Review the full details and preview
  3. Click Install Template
  4. Choose which workspace or sub-account to install it into (if you manage multiple)
  5. Confirm the installation
  6. The template is now ready to use in your account—customize as needed

For paid templates, you'll see the price clearly displayed. Payment is processed immediately through GoHighLevel's payment system, and the creator receives their commission. You get instant access—no waiting, no manual fulfillment.

Step-by-Step: How to List and Sell Your Own Templates

Now for the profitable part—turning your templates into a revenue stream. GoHighLevel makes it straightforward to list and sell your own templates to the marketplace community.

Step 1: Prepare Your Template

Before listing, ensure your template is polished and functional. Test it thoroughly in your own account. Add quality stock images, clean up workflows, and write clear descriptions. Your template represents your expertise—make it count.

Step 2: Navigate to Your Creator Dashboard

From your account settings, find the Marketplace Seller or Creator Tools section. This is where you manage all your template listings.

Step 3: Upload Your Template

GoHighLevel allows you to export a template from your account and prepare it for the marketplace. The system will guide you through packaging it so buyers receive exactly what you intend—landing pages, automations, email sequences, or all of the above.

Step 4: Set Your Pricing

Decide whether your template will be free (to build your audience and credibility) or paid. If paid, set a price point. Many successful creators price templates between $29–$297 depending on complexity and value delivered. GoHighLevel handles all payment processing and deposits revenue to your account.

Step 5: Write a Compelling Description

Your description is marketing copy. Explain:

  • What problem the template solves
  • Who it's best for (agencies, e-commerce, B2B, etc.)
  • Exactly what's included (number of funnels, automations, pages)
  • Any customization required
  • Your credentials or success stories using this template

Step 6: Add Preview Images and Video

Upload high-quality screenshots showing the template in action. If possible, include a 1–2 minute demo video. Buyers want to see what they're purchasing before they commit.

Step 7: Submit for Review

GoHighLevel's team reviews your template to ensure it meets quality standards, doesn't contain malware or broken links, and provides genuine value. This typically takes 24–48 hours. Once approved, your template goes live in the marketplace.

Managing Your Template Listings and Monetization Settings

Once your templates are live, management is ongoing. GoHighLevel provides a creator dashboard where you can track sales, revenue, customer feedback, and ratings in real-time.

Key features include:

  • Sales Analytics: See how many customers purchased, when, and from which region
  • Revenue Tracking: Monitor earnings and payouts directly in your GoHighLevel account
  • Customer Ratings and Reviews: Read feedback to identify what customers love and what could be improved
  • Template Performance: Check which of your templates converts best and optimize lower performers
  • Listing Management: Edit descriptions, pricing, or images anytime without re-approval
  • Support Ticket System: Handle customer questions directly through the marketplace interface

You can also control whether templates are available to the public marketplace, private (sold only to specific clients), or available through partner programs.

Why Integrated Marketplace Saves Agencies Time and Money

The real value of GoHighLevel's integrated marketplace isn't just about selling templates—it's about efficiency. Before this integration existed, agencies had to:

  • Use Gumroad, Teachable, or another platform to host templates
  • Manage separate payment processing and invoicing
  • Handle customer support across multiple channels
  • Manually deliver files via email or file hosting
  • Track sales and revenue across disconnected systems
  • Waste time switching between platforms

GoHighLevel consolidates all of this into one interface. Every sale, every customer interaction, every revenue dollar flows through the same system managing your client work. This unified approach reduces overhead, cuts out middlemen fees, and lets you focus on what matters—building better templates and serving your clients.

For buyers, the benefit is equally clear: they discover templates, preview them, purchase, and install—all without leaving GoHighLevel. The friction is gone. Conversion rates are higher, and customer satisfaction improves.
